identity.name: Puddle
identity.story: Turned down the princess politely. The pond life suits him and the crown would not have.

relationships.kind: the princess he turned down, on excellent terms
said yes to the same offer, in some other tale, and moved to the pond once he worked out why Puddle didn't
shares the fountain rim most high suns, on principle: whatever either of them used to look like is a worse story than the one they're currently having

behavior.label: Puddle's proof a kiss was never required

children.label: trading the sunniest inch of rim with Cygnet, half a turn each, proof neither of them needed a kiss to end up somewhere worth sitting
